basic_details.job_title: HLL Security Inspector Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: HLL Lifecare (HLL) Security Inspector Notification 2026 has been released on the official website lifecarehll.com. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the HLL Security Inspector Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HLL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download HLL Security Inspector Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: HLL Security Inspector Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the HLL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download HLL Security Inspector Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HLL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: HLL Security Inspector Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HLL SECURITY INSPECTOR recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the HLL SECURITY INSPECTOR recruitment is 08-07-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the SECURITY INSPECTOR post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the SECURITY INSPECTOR post is Graduation. Candidates must possess a valid degree to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the SECURITY INSPECTOR position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the SECURITY INSPECTOR position is 58 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the SECURITY INSPECTOR role?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the SECURITY INSPECTOR role ranges from Rs. 11000 to Rs. 22000 per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the SECURITY INSPECTOR post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the SECURITY INSPECTOR post in HLL Lifecare.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for HLL SECURITY INSPECTOR recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the SECURITY INSPECTOR post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the SECURITY INSPECTOR post includes an Interview and Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on these stages.

faq.question: Q9. In which state and city is this HLL recruitment located?
faq.answer: This HLL recruitment is located in Karnataka, specifically in the city of Belgaum.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job. The selected candidates will be appointed on a contract basis with HLL Lifecare.
